rag_rules: Use `assume "label": expression;` to express input assumptions.
Place assumptions and guarantees in the component type annex.
Use case-provided thresholds and visible feature names in contracts.
generic_rules: AGREE contracts are enclosed in `annex agree { ... };` blocks.
Ensure AGREE expressions use types consistent with the AADL model.
Relate visible outputs to visible inputs in guarantees.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use `eq name : type = expression;` for equation declarations.
Define boolean ranges with `bool = x >= min_value and x <= max_value;`
anti_patterns: Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes.
Avoid encoding AADL properties (e.g., Compute_Execution_Time) directly in AGREE expressions unless they are exposed as ports or constants.
Do not convert Boolean domain values into integers.
